# Style and Theme

## `style` in `site.json`

```json
"style": {
  "darkMode": true,
  "bootstrapTheme": "bootswatch-cerulean",
  "codeTheme": "light",
  "codeLineNumbers": true
}
```

## Options

- `darkMode`: `true` / `false`
- `bootstrapTheme`: `bootswatch-<theme>`
- `codeTheme`: `light` / `dark`
- `codeLineNumbers`: `true` / `false`

## User Guide Sources

- <https://markbind.org/userGuide/siteJsonFile.html#style>
- <https://markbind.org/userGuide/themes.html>
- <https://markbind.org/userGuide/darkMode.html>
